Stylish Fully-Furnished Studio Apartment in Avondale – Modern Comfort, Ultimate Convenience

43x Studios are now available at 7 Layard St, Avondale!

**Furnishings Provided**

Experience the best of city fringe living in these well presented, nearly-new furnished studio apartments, thoughtfully designed for those who value both comfort and lifestyle.
Ideal for singles, students, or busy professionals, this contemporary space puts you in the heart of vibrant Avondale.

**Why You’ll Love Living Here:**

Bright, colourful interiors with quality furnishings throughout
Spacious open-plan living – light-filled and inviting
Fully equipped kitchen with premium appliances
Bedroom and lounge furniture included!
Easy-care bathroom with separate toilet
Secure building with individual floor access, extensive CCTV coverage & gated entry
Onsite carpark available for just $15 per week

**Exclusive Resident Amenities:**

Welcoming foyer for you and your guests
Onsite laundry facilities for your convenience - or go to one of the three local laundomats
Secure bicycle storage
Lift access and main stairwell

Perfectly positioned in a sought-after city-fringe location, this modern apartment complex is just 100 metres from the Avondale Train Station, making your daily commute effortless. Avondale Primary School sits just over the fence, and you’re within easy walking distance to local shops, cafés, healthcare facilities, public transport, and beautiful green parks – everything you need, right at your doorstep.

Move in costs:
2 weeks' rent in advance
Bond - 4 weeks rent

We have a range of studios to choose from - yellow or blue-themed interiors, across four levels – ground-floor units feature private courtyards, while upper levels offer elevated views. All are approx 50–57m².

On-site parking is also available for just $15 per week (conditions apply).

Avondale Urban Oasis: 2-Bed, 2-Bath & Sun-Drenched Privacy!

VIEWINGS ARE BY APPOINTMENT ONLY. Please register online to secure your spot. To register, go to our website: http://www.barfoot.co.nz/Branches/mt-albert/Rentals. Select the property and click the 'Book a viewing' button.

Light, Bright, and Ideally Situated
If you’re looking for a modern home that balances privacy with a vibrant urban lifestyle, Unit 3 at 2B Walsall Street is a must-see. Tucked away at the very end of the row, this townhouse benefits from extra windows that flood the home with natural light while offering a level of tranquility rarely found in central locations.

Key Features

Modern Open-Plan Living: The ground floor features a spacious, light-filled living area that flows seamlessly through sliding doors to your own private, paved courtyard—perfect for a morning coffee or low-maintenance entertaining.

Designer Kitchen: Cook in style with a sleek, contemporary kitchen featuring stone-look benchtops, high-quality stainless steel appliances (including a dishwasher), and ample cabinetry.

Dual Suite Comfort: Upstairs, the master bedroom is a true retreat with a private ensuite and wardrobe. The second generous bedroom has easy access to the main family bathroom, providing a great setup for professionals or a small family.

Smart Storage & Transport: While there is no dedicated car park, the building provides a shielded bike rack—ideal for e-bikes and as it's on the end of the row you could fit a Vespa out of the way by the front door.

Parking & Logistics
Parking on Walsall Street is currently P120. For long-term parking, unrestricted street parking is available just a short 230m stroll away on Robertson Road or the further end of Walsall Street.

The Location: Markets, Cafes & Connectivity
Avondale is one of Auckland’s most exciting suburbs, and you are right in the thick of it:

Food & Drink: Walk to local favourites like Browne Street Cafe for your morning brew or grab a world-famous burger at Baby G Burger.

Weekends: The iconic Avondale Sunday Markets and local train station are just moments away, making your weekend plans and weekday commute a breeze.

School Zones
This property is perfectly positioned for families, sitting in-zone for:

Avondale Primary School
Avondale Intermediate
Avondale College

No Smoking.
Pets considered on application.
Furniture is NOT included.

Move-in costs: 4 weeks rent for bond + 1 weeks rent in advance.
